nasb.text: You shall take them from their hands, and offer them up in smoke on the altar on the burnt offering for a soothing aroma before the Lord; it is an offering by fire to the Lord.

esv.text: Then you shall take them from their hands and burn them on the altar on top of the burnt offering, as a pleasing aroma before the Lord. It is a food offering to the Lord.

cnv.text: 你要從他們手中接過來，向著祭壇把這些東西燒在燔祭之上，在耶和華面前作馨香之氣，這是獻給耶和華的火祭。

ccb.text: 然后，你要把这些祭物接过来，放在祭坛上焚烧献给耶和华，成为蒙耶和华悦纳的馨香火祭。
